# Dex Skill Catalog

Every skill you can run, grouped by what it does. Type `/` in the chat box to
fuzzy-search any of these, or just ask Dex in plain language.

## 📅 Daily & Weekly

- **/daily-plan** — Generate context-aware daily plan with calendar, tasks, and priorities. Includes midweek awareness, meeting intelligence, commitment tracking, and smart scheduling suggestions.
- **/daily-review** — End of day review with learning capture, daily plan completion tracking, and meeting follow-up surfacing.
- **/week-plan** — Create a weekly plan by pulling email, calendar, pipeline opportunities, and open tasks.
- **/week-review** — Review week's progress with concrete accomplishments (not fake percentages), pattern detection, and goal tracking.
- **/journal** — Toggle journaling or start a journal entry (morning/evening/weekly)

## 🎯 Quarterly & Strategy

- **/quarter-plan** — Set 3-5 strategic goals for the quarter
- **/quarter-review** — Review quarter completion and capture learnings
- **/industry-truths** — Define time-horizoned assumptions about your industry/domain that ground strategic thinking and prevent building on quicksand
- **/product-brief** — Extract product ideas through guided questions and generate PRD
- **/identity-snapshot** — Generate a living identity model from existing Dex data — working patterns, decision tendencies, quality preferences, and growth areas.

## 🤝 Meetings

- **/meeting-prep** — Prepare for meetings by gathering attendee context and related topics
- **/log-meeting** — Log meeting notes to Dex and Salesforce in one step — extracts action items, matches opportunity, pushes activity log
- **/process-meetings** — Process synced Granola meetings to update person pages, extract tasks, and organize meeting notes
- **/commitment-scan** — Scan ScreenPipe data for uncommitted asks and promises, match to projects/people, and offer to create tasks.

## 💰 Sales & Pipeline

- **/pipeline-sync** — Sync Salesforce opportunities into project pages with quotes and contact links

## 📁 Projects & Tasks

- **/triage** — Strategically route orphaned files and extract scattered tasks
- **/project-health** — Scan active projects for status, blockers, and next steps
- **/save-insight** — Capture learnings from completed work for future reference

## 🚀 Career

- **/career-setup** — Initialize career development system (job description, ladder, reviews, goals)
- **/career-coach** — Personal career coach with 4 modes: weekly reports, monthly reflections, self-reviews, promotion assessments
- **/resume-builder** — Build resume and LinkedIn profile through guided interview

## 🔌 Setup & Integrations

- **/setup** — Initial Dex system setup and onboarding
- **/getting-started** — Interactive post-onboarding tour with adaptive pathways based on available data
- **/calendar-setup** — Grant Python calendar access for 30x faster calendar queries (30s → <1s)
- **/granola-setup** — Connect Granola to Dex via Granola's official API for automatic meeting sync and transcripts
- **/google-workspace-setup** — Connect Google Workspace (Gmail, Calendar, Docs) to Dex for email-aware planning and meeting prep
- **/ms-teams-setup** — Connect Microsoft Teams to Dex for cross-channel context awareness
- **/zoom-setup** — Connect Zoom to Dex for meeting recordings, scheduling, and transcript context
- **/atlassian-setup** — Connect Jira and Confluence to Dex for project tracking and knowledge search
- **/todoist-setup** — Connect Todoist to Dex for two-way task sync
- **/trello-setup** — Connect Trello to Dex for visual Kanban task sync
- **/things-setup** — Connect Things 3 to Dex for bi-directional task sync
- **/screenpipe-setup** — Enable ambient work intelligence via screen OCR (beta feature)
- **/enable-semantic-search** — Enable local AI-powered semantic search with smart collection discovery
- **/ai-setup** — Configure AI model options - budget cloud models (save 80%+) and offline mode (use Dex without internet)
- **/ai-status** — Check your AI model configuration - see what's set up, current model, credits remaining
- **/create-mcp** — Create new MCP integration with guided wizard
- **/dex-add-mcp** — Add an MCP server using Dex-safe scope (user by default)
- **/integrate-mcp** — Integrate existing MCP servers from Smithery.ai or GitHub repositories
- **/dex-obsidian-setup** — Enable Obsidian integration and migrate existing vault to wiki links
- **/beta-activate** — Activate a beta feature using an activation code
- **/beta-status** — View your activated beta features and their status

## 🛠️ System & Maintenance

- **/dex-update** — Safely update Dex with one command (handles everything automatically)
- **/dex-rollback** — Undo the last Dex update if something went wrong
- **/dex-whats-new** — Check for system improvements (learnings + Claude updates)
- **/dex-level-up** — Discover unused Dex features based on your usage patterns
- **/dex-backlog** — AI-powered ranking of Dex system improvement ideas
- **/dex-improve** — Workshop an improvement idea into implementation plan
- **/dex-demo** — Toggle demo mode (see `.claude/reference/demo-mode.md`)
- **/health-check** — Diagnose and fix Dex system health issues — MCP servers, config, recent errors
- **/reset** — Restructure Dex system based on new role or preferences
- **/create-skill** — Create a custom skill that's protected from Dex updates. Automatically appends -custom to ensure your skill is never overwritten.
- **/prompt-improver** — Transform vague prompts into rich, structured prompts with automatic fallback
- **/xray** — Understand what just happened under the hood - learn AI by seeing it in action
- **/scrape** — Scrape web pages using Scrapling MCP — stealth fetching, anti-bot bypass, CSS selectors. No API key needed.

## 📦 Other

- **/customer-intel** — Deep customer intelligence from Salesforce Asset records (EDA/UCC data) — equipment inventory, lease expiration tracking, purchase pattern analysis, and strategic outreach timing
- **/dex** — Show the full catalog of Dex skills grouped by category — your menu of everything Dex can do
- **/outreach-drafts-custom** — Generate targeted Outlook draft emails for sales events and promotions — pulls matching contacts from Salesforce, writes personalized emails, and pushes them to Outlook Drafts via PowerShell.
- **/pipeline-review** — Weekly pipeline activity review — surface recent activity across all deals, select what to log to Salesforce, and sync in one shot
- **/review** — End of day review with learning capture. Integrates with evening journaling if enabled.
- **/week-itinerary** — Build the weekly field itinerary Excel file — pulls Salesforce opportunities, open tasks, calendar events, and email follow-ups, then routes accounts by territory and exports a formatted .xlsx matching the standard template.

_61 skills total. Regenerated by `node .scripts/sync-skill-commands.cjs`._
